reference: SHE STOOD THERE LOOKING CONSCIOUSLY AND RATHER SERIOUSLY AT MISTER RANSOM A SMILE OF EXCEEDING FAINTNESS PLAYED ABOUT HER LIPS IT WAS JUST PERCEPTIBLE ENOUGH TO LIGHT UP THE NATIVE GRAVITY OF HER FACE
text: she stood there looking consciously and rather seriously at mr ransom a smile of exceeding faintness played about her lips it was just perceptible enough to light up the native gravity of her face you
